title: Snowy Spirit - Doggo Compat
description: makes Doggo Mod Overhauled compatible with Snowy Spirit. allowing doggo's to pull sleds
body:
This DATAPACK makes [Doggo Mod Overhauled ](https://modrinth.com/mod/doggo-mod-overhauled) compatible with [Snowy Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowy-spirit). allowing doggo's to pull sleds

Id highly recommend using a datapack loader such as [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi) to automatically load the datapack for you in every world

Built and tested for fabric 1.20.1. Likely works with other versions without issue
